entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: The runtime baseline is now clean, but the next-value slice still needs to move from repair work into the actual v2.4 execution packet definition work.
entries.expectation_state: Historical task-id collision is resolved, organization-audit is green, and the runtime backlog is consistent again.
entries.mismatch_state: The runtime baseline is now clean, but the next-value slice still needs to move from repair work into the actual v2.4 execution packet definition work.
entries.scale_direction: Promote TASK-012 to the active operating focus and start defining role result, team output, council review, and execution lineage artifacts.

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: The remaining step is human sign-off and tag creation; product runtime state itself no longer shows a blocking v2.3 integrity issue.
entries.expectation_state: v2.3 operator surfaces, unified audit, runtime integrity fixes, release docs, smoke, and tests are now aligned into a release-ready candidate.
entries.mismatch_state: The remaining step is human sign-off and tag creation; product runtime state itself no longer shows a blocking v2.3 integrity issue.
entries.scale_direction: Hold for human release approval and tag creation, then promote TASK-012 as the first post-v2.3 active work item.

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: The remaining step is human sign-off and tag creation; the next product gap shifts to v2.5 governed allocation and policy evaluation.
entries.expectation_state: v2.4 execution packet contracts, lineage surface, release docs, tests, smoke, and organization audit are aligned into a release-ready candidate.
entries.mismatch_state: The remaining step is human sign-off and tag creation; the next product gap shifts to v2.5 governed allocation and policy evaluation.
